use rayon::prelude::*;

// GOOD: filter in the parallel pipeline
fn find_large_files(paths: &[PathBuf]) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
    paths.par_iter()
        .filter(|path| {
            std::fs::metadata(path)
                .map(|m| m.len() > 1_000_000)
                .unwrap_or(false)
        })
        .cloned()
        .collect()
}

fn process_valid_items(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Output> {
    items.par_iter()
        .filter(|item| item.is_valid())
        .map(|item| process(item))
        .collect()
}
